response.global_summary: The video is a Hololive VTuber performance featuring Shirakami Fubuki, Natsuiro Matsuri, Akai Haato, and Aki Rosenthal. It includes two song performances and a central dialogue segment where the performers discuss their setlist.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki performs the song 'Sakura no Ato (all quartets lead to the?)'. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: 桜のあと (all quartets lead to the?)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
All quartets lead, lead to…? say la-la-la…
やあ また会えたね こんばんは いや こんにちはだっけ?
じゃじゃじゃじゃーん 足りない! キック、リズムを打て!
歌うよ、でたらめでいいよね?
All quartets lead, lead to…? say la-la-la…
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
All quartets lead, lead to…? say la-la-la…
Hey, we met again, didn't we? Good evening. No, was it good afternoon?
Ta-da! Not enough! Kick, hit the rhythm!
I'll sing it, it's okay if it's nonsense, right?
All quartets lead, lead to…? say la-la-la…
